description_long: This is a single, low-cut casual shoe with a rounded toe and a visibly worn, dusty exterior. The upper is made of faded brownish fabric or leather, showing significant discoloration and creasing, especially around the toe box and sides. The shoe features six eyelets for laces, but the laces are missing, leaving the tongue exposed. The collar is padded and the interior lining appears to be a darker, possibly synthetic material. The sole is thick, black, and flat, with a slightly raised heel and visible wear, especially at the back. Overall, the shoe looks well-used, with scuff marks and dirt accumulation, suggesting it has been exposed to urban outdoor environments.
description: A single, low-cut, brown casual shoe with a worn, dusty exterior, missing laces, and a thick black sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, missing laces, and exposed tongue with visible dirt and creasing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the faded, creased upper, padded collar, and thick black sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel, worn back of the sole, and interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals more discoloration, creasing, and the overall worn condition of the shoe.
